name: Sarah Kimani
message: We're getting 200+ order forms a day by email and it's a mess. Need something that can read them and update our inventory sheet automatically. Would like to start within 2 weeks if possible.
summary: Sarah wants an automated solution to parse 200+ daily email order forms and sync them to her inventory sheet, with a stated budget and a two-week start timeline.
recommended_action: Reach out within 24 hours to schedule a demo call showcasing email order parsing and inventory automation, and prepare a proposal that fits the $2000-4000 budget with a two-week onboarding plan.

name: Marcus Webb
message: Our intake team spends hours copying client info from PDF forms into our case management system. Looking for a long-term contractor, not just a one-off project. Budget is flexible for the right person.
summary: Marcus wants a long-term contractor to automate manual PDF-to-case-management data entry for his law firm's intake team.
recommended_action: Reach out within 24 hours to schedule a discovery call, confirm the case management system used, and prepare a retainer proposal emphasizing ongoing intake automation.

name: Amara Okafor
message: We manually reply to the same 15 FAQs from parents every day on WhatsApp. Want a bot that handles the routine ones and flags anything unusual for a human. Ready to sign this week.
summary: Amara wants a WhatsApp FAQ automation bot that handles routine parent inquiries and escalates unusual ones to a human, with intent to sign this week.
recommended_action: Call Amara today to demo a WhatsApp FAQ automation solution and send a $1500-tier proposal to close the deal this week.

name: Julie Tremblay
message: Curious what automation could even do for a small real estate agency. Happy to hop on a call to learn more.
summary: Julie runs a small real estate agency and wants to learn how automation could help her business.
recommended_action: Schedule a discovery call to understand her workflows and pain points, and present tailored automation examples for small real estate agencies to help clarify budget and needs.

name: David Chen
message: Just looking around, saw your profile, might need something someday for our dispatch system. No rush at all.
summary: David is casually exploring options and may eventually need something for his dispatch system, but has no immediate need or defined budget.
recommended_action: Add David to a nurture email sequence with dispatch-system content and set a reminder to check in with him in 60-90 days.

name: Unknown Sender
message: CONGRATULATIONS you have been selected for our investment opportunity click here now!!!
summary: The message is an unsolicited spam solicitation with no genuine buying intent.
recommended_action: Do not respond; mark as spam and block the sender.
